# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: ci

on:
  push:
    branches: ["**"]
  pull_request:
    branches: ["**"]
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

env:
  NODE_VERSION: "20"
  PYTHON_VERSION: "3.11"
  PIP_CACHE_DIR: ${{ github.workspace }}/.cache/pip

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        environment: [dev, staging, prod]

    env:
      APP_ENV: ${{ matrix.environment }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: npm

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Cache pip + node_modules + build outputs + configs (env-specific)
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            **/node_modules
            ${{ env.PIP_CACHE_DIR }}
            .venv
            venv
            **/.venv
            **/venv
            dist
            build
            .next/cache
            .turbo
            .parcel-cache
            .cache
            coverage
            .pytest_cache
            **/__pycache__
            .mypy_cache
            .ruff_cache
            .eslintcache
            .stylelintcache
            .prettiercache
            .npmrc
            .yarnrc
            .yarnrc.yml
            .pnpm-store
            pnpm-lock.yaml
            package-lock.json
            yarn.lock
            requirements.txt
            requirements-dev.txt
            requirements-prod.txt
            Pipfile
            Pipfile.lock
            poetry.lock
            pyproject.toml
            setup.cfg
            setup.py
            tox.ini
            .python-version
            .nvmrc
            .tool-versions
            .env
            .env.*
            config/**
            configs/**
            .config/**
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-py${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-env${{ matrix.environment }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/yarn.lock', '**/pnpm-lock.yaml', '**/npm-shrinkwrap.json', '**/requirements*.txt', '**/Pipfile.lock', '**/poetry.lock', '**/pyproject.toml', '**/setup.cfg', '**/setup.py', '**/tox.ini', '**/.npmrc', '**/.yarnrc*', '**/.python-version', '**/.nvmrc', '**/.tool-versions', '**/.env', '**/.env.*', 'config/**', 'configs/**', '.config/**') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-node${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-py${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-env${{ matrix.environment }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-node${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-py${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-

      - name: Install Node dependencies (if needed)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then
            npm ci
          elif [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]; then
            corepack enable
            pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
          elif [ -f yarn.lock ]; then
            corepack enable
            yarn install --frozen-lockfile
          elif [ -f package.json ]; then
            npm install
          else
            echo "No Node project detected."
          fi

      - name: Install Python dependencies (if needed)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          mkdir -p "${PIP_CACHE_DIR}"
          if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then
            pip install -r requirements.txt --cache-dir "${PIP_CACHE_DIR}"
          elif [ -f pyproject.toml ] && [ -f poetry.lock ]; then
            pip install poetry --cache-dir "${PIP_CACHE_DIR}"
            poetry install --no-interaction
          elif [ -f Pipfile.lock ]; then
            pip install pipenv --cache-dir "${PIP_CACHE_DIR}"
            pipenv sync --dev
          else
            echo "No Python dependency file detected."
          fi

      - name: Build
        shell: bash
        run: |
          if [ -f package.json ]; then
            npm run build --if-present
          fi
          if [ -f pyproject.toml ] || [ -f setup.py ] || [ -f requirements.txt ]; then
            echo "Python build step not defined; add your build/test commands here."
          fi

      - name: Test
        shell: bash
        run: |
          if [ -f package.json ]; then
            npm test --if-present
          fi
          if command -v pytest >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            pytest -q || true
          fi
